name: Loss Acknowledgment
description: Respectful post after a Dinamo defeat. Measured tone that acknowledges the result while looking forward to the next challenge.

subheadline.example: We regroup and focus on the next challenge ahead

guidelines: Use a subdued, desaturated hero image. The overlay is heavier to create a somber but dignified atmosphere. The accent color is muted compared to standard blue. Messaging should be respectful and forward-looking — never blame players or officials. Always reference the next fixture to maintain optimism.
